properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When you’re talking to the Father At the mercy throne, Oh Jesus, remember me, When my fragile heart is hurting and I feel so alone, Oh Jesus, remember me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause you are faithful beyond faithful You have heard my every cry Every sin you have forgotten though I’ve never known just why As you are looking down from heaven All the millions you must see, Oh Jesus, remember me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I think I’ve got the answers But it all just comes out wrong, Oh Jesus, remember me, When brokenness and heartache Leaves me running home, Oh Jesus, remember me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord sometimes I just feel a little lost, But I know you hear every word I say, Like the thief who hung beside you on the cross who prayed.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When you come into your kingdom And paradise you see, Oooh Jesus, remember me, Ooooh Jesus, remember… me.
